title: Mobile-native E2E Runner Output
description: Output of qa-mobile-e2e-runner agent (CAPABILITY-UPGRADE Wave A, Q3 — DORMANT/备选). Runs Maestro YAML flows on emulator/simulator (real device optional) ONLY when a real mobile-app marker is detected; emits NOT_APPLICABLE on pure web/backend projects (the correct, honest outcome — not a defect). Consumed by enterprise-qa-testing Mobile E2E layer (§4). decision_hint is a draft — the parent skill / deterministic gate makes the final call.

command_evidence.description: Mandatory when activated (min 1 entry). EXEMPT when decision_hint == NOT_APPLICABLE — the activation gate ran nothing by design.

mobile_marker_found.description: no marker => decision_hint NOT_APPLICABLE; never force a mobile test on web/backend

selector_strategy.description: prefer id / text / accessibility-id; raw coordinate taps flagged FRAGILE_SELECTOR in notes

artifacts.description: Maestro --debug-output: screenshots + view hierarchy on failure

flakiness_note.description: retry-pass is NOT a clean PASS; set this so the parent routes it to qa-flaky-governance

decision_hint.description: Agent's draft assessment; parent skill / deterministic gate makes final decision. Non-mobile project => NOT_APPLICABLE, never PASS/FAIL; tool_missing => BLOCKED.
